Class MenuTheme

java.lang.Object
com.lwidev.survisland.api.menu.MenuTheme
public final class MenuTheme extends Object
Shared visual building blocks for SurvislandMenus: filler, navigation items, click sound.

    • toggleItem

      public static org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack toggleItem(String label, boolean enabled)
      On/off state item (e.g. a feature toggle button), consistent wool color + label across menus.
